app.title: Mental Wellness Portal
app.tagline: Your journey to better mental health starts here

auth.name: Name
auth.noAccount: Don't have an account? Sign up
auth.haveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.privacyNote: Your data is strictly confidential, encrypted, and never used for medical diagnosis. Your privacy is our priority.

assessment.title: AI Wellness Assessment
assessment.subtitle: Structured · Adaptive · Encrypted
assessment.step1: Answer 7 standardized wellness questions (PHQ-9 / GAD-7 style)
assessment.step2: Our AI asks 2–3 follow-up questions to understand your context
assessment.step3: Get a precise score (0–27) with personalized recommendations
assessment.aiFollowupNote: AI follow-up adds up to 6 points based on severity context
questions: Little interest or pleasure in doing things?
Feeling tired or having little energy?
Feeling nervous, anxious, or on edge?
assessment.question: Question

dashboard.title: Your Wellness Overview
dashboard.guidedBreathingDesc: Take a 3-minute breather to lower anxiety and center your mind.
dashboard.aiCompanionDesc: Chat out your feelings in a safe, judgment-free space.
dashboard.dailyCheckinDesc: Log your current mood to keep your weekly tracking accurate.
dashboard.allConversationsEncrypted: All conversations are encrypted and auto-deleted after 90 days
dashboard.snapshot: Here is a snapshot of your recent assessment and mood trends.
dashboard.statusMinimal: You're doing great! Keep maintaining your positive habits.
dashboard.statusMild: You are experiencing mild symptoms. Consider light mindfulness exercises.
dashboard.statusModerate: You have moderate symptoms. Taking a break and guided breathing might help.
dashboard.statusSevere: You have significant symptoms. Please consider reaching out to a professional.

mood.title: How are you feeling today?
mood.logCurrentMood: Log your current mood to track your emotional well-being over time.
mood.trackingStep: Thank you for checking in. Tracking your feelings is a great step towards mindfulness.

chat.title: AI Companion
chat.greeting: Hello. I am your mental wellness companion. How are you feeling right now?
chat.signInPrompt: To use the AI chat feature, please sign in or continue anonymously. I can still chat with you using fallback responses!

home.tagline: A minimalist, immersive scroll-based experience to track, understand, and nurture your mental well-being.
home.discoverPatternsDesc: As you move forward, you uncover insights into what elevates your state of mind and what brings it down over time.
home.dailyRitualsDesc: Connect with yourself through tracked moods, guided breathing, and anonymous ambient relaxation spaces.
home.safePrivateSpaceDesc: Take our guided PHQ-9 & GAD-7 based assessments completely anonymously, or create an account to save your journey.

history.title: Assessment History
history.subtitle: Track your mental wellness journey over time
history.noAssessmentsDesc: Complete your first assessment to start tracking your wellness journey

breathe.title: Guided Breathing
breathe.subtitle: Breathing exercise to calm and center

ambient.title: Ambient Mode
ambient.subtitle: Immerse in calming soundscapes
ambient.immerse: Immerse yourself in calming soundscapes to focus, relax, or sleep.

resources.title: Support & Resources
resources.subtitle: You are not alone. Whether you need immediate help or are just looking for ways to improve your mental well-being, these resources are here for you.
resources.nationalCrisisDesc: Free, confidential support for people in distress, 24/7.
resources.crisisTextDesc: Text HOME to connect with a volunteer Crisis Counselor 24/7.
resources.therapistFinderDesc: Find a licensed therapist within your local area or online.
resources.mindfulnessLibraryDesc: A curated collection of guided meditations and articles on mental well-being.
resources.wellnessTip: Taking just 5 minutes a day to practice mindful breathing can lower cortisol levels, reducing stress and anxiety significantly over time.

exercises.title: Movement for Mental Clarity
exercises.subtitle: Short guided exercises release endorphins, reduce cortisol, and clear mental fog. Follow the animations at your own pace.

videos.title: Recommended Videos For You
videos.description: These videos may help improve your mood
videos.loading: Finding the best videos for you...

music.title: Music Therapy
music.description: Recommended music to improve your mood

games.title: Game Hub
games.subtitle: AI-powered cognitive challenges
games.noGames: No games played yet. Be the first!
games.signInToSave: Sign in to save your game progress and track XP across sessions.
games.aiCrafting: AI is crafting a unique puzzle for you
games.memorizeDesc: It will disappear when the timer ends
games.signInProgress: Sign in to save your progress

categories.logicDesc: Test your reasoning and deductive thinking
